feed.title: AI Agent Infrastructure Landscape — recent activity
feed.subtitle: The 50 most-recently verified systems in the v6 catalog.

entry.title: Bytebot
entry.summary: OSS desktop-control agent runtime (containerised Linux desktop) · Computer-use & desktop agents · Open-source desktop-agent runtime that runs an LLM-controlled Linux desktop inside Docker — uses xdotool / X11 capture for control. Pitched as the 'self-hosted Operator' alternative; agent sees a real desktop screen, not just a browser.

entry.title: EWC (Elastic Weight Consolidation)
entry.summary: Quadratic constraint per weight · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Kirkpatrick et al. Soft quadratic constraint pulls each weight back toward old values, scaled by importance for prior tasks. PNAS 2017.

entry.title: GPT Engineer
entry.summary: Spec-to-codebase agent · Agent frameworks (no first-party memory layer) · One of the original 'agent writes a whole codebase from a prompt' demos — community-maintained; spawned the commercial Lovable (gptengineer.app).

entry.title: I-JEPA
entry.summary: Joint-embedding predictive arch (image) · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Meta. Self-supervised image learning by predicting target-block representations from a context block in latent space — no hand-crafted augmentations or pixel reconstruction. Foundation of LeCun's hierarchical-JEPA programme. CVPR 2023.

entry.title: Mem0 MCP (official)
entry.summary: Hybrid vector + graph via cloud API · Claude Code memory mechanisms · Mem0's managed cloud API exposed as MCP tools. Semantic search + CRUD on memories scoped by user / agent / session. Cloud-hosted MCP endpoint — no local infrastructure required.

entry.title: Text Generation Inference (TGI)
entry.summary: HF inference server · Inference platforms & gateways · Hugging Face's production inference server for LLMs — continuous batching, FlashAttention, quantization (bitsandbytes, GPTQ).

entry.title: π0.5 (Physical Intelligence)
entry.summary: Multi-Scale Embodied Memory (short + long episodic) · Vertical / domain-specific AI memory · Extends π0 with MEM layer giving the policy short-term (within-task) + long-term (cross-task, >10-min horizon) memory. Co-trained on robot teleoperation + human video + text. Hierarchical inference: VLA predicts subtasks as text tokens, then executes as action chunks.

entry.title: 01.AI Yi family
entry.summary: Open-weights frontier-tier Chinese model family (Yi-Lightning / Yi-34B) · Foundation models (substrate reference) · Kai-Fu Lee's 01.AI (founded 2023, Beijing). Yi family open-weights — Yi-34B (2023), Yi-Large (proprietary 2024), Yi-Lightning (2024-10, frontier-tier, matched GPT-4o on LMSYS chatbot arena). Apache 2.0 (Yi-34B and base sizes). Important second Chinese open-weights option alongside DeepSeek + Qwen.

entry.title: 11x.ai
entry.summary: AI sales agents (Alice, Mike, Jordan) · Use-case-specific agent harnesses · Founded 2022 by Hasan Sukkar; AI sales agents Alice (outbound SDR), Mike (voice SDR), Jordan (RevOps). $50M Series B Oct-2024 (Benchmark + Andreessen Horowitz; $350M val). Among the most-discussed AI-employee startups of 2024.

entry.title: 1X Technologies
entry.summary: Humanoid robot maker (Neo / Eve) — OpenAI portfolio · Robotics foundation models & agent stacks · Norway / US humanoid robot company — Eve (wheeled bimanual) + Neo (legged humanoid, consumer-targeted, late 2025 / 2026 launch). Raised $100M Series B (Jan-2024, EQT + OpenAI Startup Fund); $40M Series A (Mar-2023, OpenAI lead). Distinguishing feature: consumer-home positioning rather than industrial.

entry.title: 6sense
entry.summary: ABM intent + AI agent platform · Use-case-specific agent harnesses · Founded 2013; ABM/intent platform with Revenue AI agents. $200M Series E Jan-2022 ($5.2B val; Blue Owl). 6sense Revenue AI agents launched 2024 — autonomous account research + email drafting.

entry.title: A-MEM
entry.summary: Atomic-note / Zettelkasten-style · Research / specialised systems · Treats memories as atomic linkable notes — explicit nod to Zettelkasten knowledge management. Dynamic linking; retroactive memory revision.

entry.title: Abridge
entry.summary: Grounded-transcript provenance · Vertical / domain-specific AI memory · Clinician-assist ambient documentation. Source mapping: every AI-generated summary element traced back to the source utterance. Audit-and-trust layer over episodic memory. Built on proprietary 1.5M+ medical-encounter dataset.

entry.title: Accelerate (Hugging Face)
entry.summary: Distributed training abstraction · Training infrastructure · Hugging Face's abstraction over distributed-training backends (DDP, FSDP, DeepSpeed, Megatron). Minimal code change to scale a PyTorch script.

entry.title: ACON
entry.summary: Context-compression optimisation · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Optimises context compression for long-horizon LLM agents.

entry.title: Activeloop Deep Lake
entry.summary: Multimodal vector + serverless Postgres · Vector-database infrastructure · Deep Memory feature optimises embedding space per use-case (+22% retrieval accuracy). Deep Lake PG unifies serverless Postgres (agent short-term state) + billion-scale vector search (long-term memory).

entry.title: Acuvity (now Proofpoint)
entry.summary: MCP / Shadow-AI runtime enforcement · Memory governance, privacy & safety · Runtime enforcement targeting memory poisoning, unauthorised execution, identity spoofing per the OWASP LLM threat list. Visibility/control over MCP servers and locally-installed AI tools — the infrastructure layer where memory is most exposed.

entry.title: Adaptive-RAG
entry.summary: Query-complexity routing · Retrieval-as-memory hybrids · Smaller classifier LM predicts query complexity, then routes to no-retrieval / single-step / iterative retrieval as appropriate. NAACL 2024.

entry.title: Adept ACT
entry.summary: Computer-use / workflow-automation agent (Adept now part of Amazon AGI 2024) · Multi-agent orchestration platforms · Founded 2022 by ex-OpenAI / Google researchers (David Luan, Kelsey Schroeder). Built ACT-1 / ACT-2 multimodal action transformers for computer-use. **Acquired by Amazon June-2024 (acqui-hire)** — co-founders + key team joined Amazon AGI; Adept the company continues with Zach Brock as remaining executive. Important historical entry — ACT models inspired Anthropic Computer Use + OpenAI Operator.

entry.title: Agency Swarm
entry.summary: OpenAI-Assistants-based multi-agent · Agent frameworks (no first-party memory layer) · Agent framework built on OpenAI Assistants API — agencies (roles + comm flow); replaced after Assistants v2 changes.

entry.title: Agent KB
entry.summary: Cross-domain experience KB · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Leverages cross-domain experience for agentic problem solving.

entry.title: AGENT-RECONFIGURE / Reconfigurable Agent
entry.summary: Skill-library agent memory · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Agent that maintains a skill library and reconfigures its toolset per task — procedural memory of successful sub-task solutions.

entry.title: Agent S
entry.summary: Open agentic computer-use framework · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Open agentic framework that uses computers like a human.

entry.title: Agent Workflow Memory
entry.summary: Workflow as memory · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Workflow-based memory framework component.

entry.title: Agent2Agent Protocol (A2A)
entry.summary: Open agent-to-agent protocol · Agent frameworks (no first-party memory layer) · Google-led open protocol for agent-to-agent collaboration (April 2025) — agent cards, RPCs, server-sent events. Partner companies: Atlassian, MongoDB, Salesforce, ServiceNow, etc.

entry.title: AgentEvolver
entry.summary: Efficient self-evolving agent system · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Towards an efficient self-evolving agent system.

entry.title: AgentFold
entry.summary: Proactive context management · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Long-horizon web agents with proactive context management.

entry.title: Agentic Memory
entry.summary: Unified short + long-term management · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Learning unified long-term and short-term memory management.

entry.title: Agentic Plan Caching (APC)
entry.summary: Test-time plan-template memory · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Extracts, stores, adapts, and reuses structured plan templates from planning stages of agent applications. NeurIPS 2025 poster.

entry.title: AgentOps
entry.summary: Operational metrics for agent memory · Memory observability & monitoring · When Mem0 is connected, gains Memory Operation Timeline, Search Analytics, Memory Growth tracking, Error Tracking per memory call. Standalone, records context at each step but doesn't analyse memory quality.

entry.title: AGENTS.md
entry.summary: Cross-tool open standard · File-backed / editor paradigms · AGENTS.md at repo root (and ~/.codex/AGENTS.md for global); hierarchical concatenation from root to cwd. Persists build/test commands, conventions, architecture overview, security constraints, git workflow.

entry.title: Agility Robotics
entry.summary: Bipedal warehouse robot maker (Digit) — first US humanoid commercial deployment · Robotics foundation models & agent stacks · Oregon-based humanoid maker; Digit is in production at GXO Logistics warehouses since Sep-2024 — claimed first humanoid in commercial service in the US. Spinout of Oregon State University. $400M+ raised (Amazon Industrial Innovation Fund participant).

entry.title: AGiXT Adaptive Memory
entry.summary: Adaptive provider-spanning + plugin storage · Framework-embedded memory · Open-source AI automation platform. Routes between short-term and long-term memory adaptively across any LLM provider; plugin system for storage backends. Memory managed at the instruction-management layer — task context, instruction state, conversation history as unified agent state.

entry.title: Agno (Phidata) Memory
entry.summary: AgentStorage + AgentMemory + DBs · Framework-embedded memory · Agno (formerly Phidata). AgentStorage persists sessions to a DB; AgentMemory auto-classifies/store user preferences and conversation summaries. Single-line integrations with LanceDB, Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant.

entry.title: AGNTCY (Internet of Agents)
entry.summary: Cisco-LangChain agent-mesh protocols · Agent frameworks (no first-party memory layer) · Cisco + LangChain-led 'Internet of Agents' collective — open standards for discovery, messaging, observability of agent networks.

entry.title: AI PERSONA
entry.summary: Life-long LLM personalisation · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Life-long personalisation of LLMs.

entry.title: AI Singapore SEA-LION
entry.summary: SE-Asian cross-lingual semantic-retrieval memory · Dedicated memory layers · SEA-LION-Embedding (March 2026): retrieval + reranking models contrastively trained on 245M text pairs across 10 SE Asian languages. SEA-BED benchmark (169 datasets). SEA-LION v4 (Gemma-based) at 128K context with native function calling.

entry.title: Aider
entry.summary: Per-repo chat history file + YAML config · Coding-agent memory · Appends conversation turns to .aider.chat.history.md in project root. restore_chat_history defaults to false — no automatic replay into new sessions. Community /session save command for JSON state snapshots. .aider.conf.yml carries static preferences.

entry.title: Aider CONVENTIONS.md / .aider.conf.yml
entry.summary: Multi-file convention pattern · File-backed / editor paradigms · CONVENTIONS.md (any name, loaded via --read or read: in config); .aider.conf.yml (home / git-root / cwd, last wins); .aiderignore (gitignore-syntax).

entry.title: Aider (harness)
entry.summary: Terminal-native AI pair programmer (OSS, Python) · Agent IDEs & coding harnesses · OSS terminal coding agent by Paul Gauthier — one of the original AI-pair-programmer CLIs (2023). Architect/Editor modes; repo-map for context; uses any LiteLLM-compatible model. Memory via CONVENTIONS.md and .aider.conf.yml — author-edited markdown. Distinct from the separate Aider memory-row in "Coding-agent memory"; this row characterises the harness itself.

entry.title: AiT (Associative Transformer)
entry.summary: Hopfield + low-rank explicit memory · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Global Workspace Layer combining low-rank explicit memory + bottleneck attention + Hopfield-style associative memory. Decouples memory from the Hopfield network via learnable explicit memory. Outperforms sparse-Transformer baselines on Sort-of-CLEVR. Latest revision Mar 2025.

entry.title: Aleph Alpha PhariaAI / PhariaCatch
entry.summary: Sovereign governed-document memory · Dedicated memory layers · German enterprise stack. PhariaCatch captures + preserves organisational knowledge through structured human-machine collaboration; PhariaAssistant queries via semantic search. Combines sovereign deployment constraints with explainability tooling.

entry.title: Algolia
entry.summary: Hosted search API · Search platforms (non-memory) · Search-as-a-service API for instant search experiences — NeuralSearch (vector) + lexical. Adopted by 12000+ companies including LVMH, Stripe.

entry.title: Algolia (NeuralSearch)
entry.summary: Neural-hash hybrid (vector + keyword) · Enterprise-search adjacencies · NeuralSearch combines vector + keyword via neural hashing — compresses to 1/10th size while retaining 99% info. AI-powered personalisation + recommendations.

entry.title: Alibaba Qwen 3 family
entry.summary: Open-weights frontier model family (Qwen 3 dense + MoE; 0.5B–235B) · Foundation models (substrate reference) · Alibaba Cloud's Qwen 3 family (2025-04) — open-weights frontier models from 0.5B to 235B-A22B MoE. Apache 2.0 (most sizes) — broadest open-weights family. Includes Qwen 3 32B dense, Qwen 3 30B-A3B MoE, Qwen 3 235B-A22B MoE. Qwen-Coder, Qwen-VL (vision), Qwen-Audio companion variants. Dominant base model for many Chinese AI startups and a top OSS substrate globally.

entry.title: Alita
entry.summary: Generalist agentic reasoning · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Generalist agent enabling scalable agentic reasoning.

entry.title: Alita-G
entry.summary: Self-evolving generative agent · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Self-evolving generative agent for agent generation.

entry.title: AllegroGraph (Franz)
entry.summary: RDF triple/quad store + reasoning · Knowledge-graph platforms · RDF triple/quad store with RDFS++ / OWL reasoning. v8.4 (May 2025) added an NLQ interface.

entry.title: AlphaEdit
entry.summary: Null-space knowledge editing · Recent method papers — theorized, no distinct product · Null-space-constrained knowledge editing for language models.

entry.title: AlphaSense
entry.summary: Financial-research search platform + Genesis AI agent · Use-case-specific agent harnesses · Founded 2010; AI-driven market intelligence — semantic search over earnings calls, broker research, regulatory filings. $4B val Jun-2024 ($650M growth round; BDT + MSP). **Acquired Tegus Jun-2024 for $930M** (expert-call transcripts). Genesis = autonomous research agent launched 2024.
